---
title: "Announcement"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

## *1st Hybrid National Seminar on Bioactive Molecules: From Characterization to Innovative Biotechnological Applications*

<br>

![](files/NSBM_poster_1.jpg){fig-alt="NSBM26 Conference Poster" width="80%" fig-align="center"}

<br>

<div style="text-align:center;">

[⬇️ Download the Conference Poster (PDF)](files/NSBM_poster.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

</div>
